no-restricted-syntax.message: No setTimeout for data consistency. Use useJobPoller for async jobs, mutation onSuccess for sync writes. See docs/contracts/frontend-contract.md §4.
Use shared/api/client.ts instead of raw fetch(). See docs/contracts/frontend-contract.md §2.
Use shared/api/client.ts instead of raw window.fetch(). See docs/contracts/frontend-contract.md §2.
Use shared/api/client.ts instead of raw globalThis.fetch(). See docs/contracts/frontend-contract.md §2.
No setTimeout for data consistency. Use useJobPoller for async jobs, mutation onSuccess for sync writes. See docs/contracts/frontend-contract.md §4.
